results.title: Argentina had to battle beyond Egypt.
results.description: Just eight teams remain in pursuit of World Cup glory.

results.title: ESPN analyst claims Paige Bueckers is ‘everything’ WNBA wanted Caitlin Clark to be
results.description: One ESPN commentator has suggested that the WNBA has found what they were looking for in Caitlin Clark through the play of Paige Bueckers. Caitlin Clark has been the most popular since she arrived in the WNBA in 2024, after two sensational seasons with the University of Iowa.

results.title: Report: Roma inquire about Como’s Assane Diao
results.description: Roma, awaiting the official transfer of Mason Greenwood to Fenerbahce, will be forced to focus on other attacking wingers who can raise the level of their attack. For Gasperini, this is a top priority...
